title: The Log Is The Agent - Ishaan Sehgal, Omnara
summary: Ishaan Sehgal argues that as LLMs commoditize, the true differentiator for agent systems is not frameworks or tools but the session log as a persistent data primitive. He contends that durable, portable logs that make agents independent of specific models or runtimes will become the foundation for next-generation agent infrastructure, enabling durability, continuity, forkability, and portability.
writeup: Ishaan Sehgal of Omnara argues that as LLMs commoditize, the differentiator for agent systems is not frameworks or tools but the session log treated as a persistent data primitive. The talk frames durable, portable logs as the foundation for next-generation agent infrastructure, decoupling agents from specific models and runtimes. The concrete takeaways: an append-only log that makes agents independent of any one model or runtime enables durability, continuity, forkability, and portability across sessions.
